channel.title: Oscar Yinn on oscaryinn
channel.description: Recent content in Oscar Yinn on oscaryinn

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, I’m Junjie Oscar Yin My research is in NLP and ML. Specifically, I am interested in understanding the relation between training data and language model’s abilities beyond simple scaling, and, through that, do good science on AI systems. I am a first-year PhD student at UW NLP, advised by Hannaneh Hajishirzi. Previously, I was fortunate to be advised by Sasha Rush at Cornell. Recently, my friends and I started WAI, where we work on open agentic research.
